title: Sanji Feeds a Starving Enemy
description: On pages 5–8, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You were almost about to die before too! hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey cook! Join my crew, Will ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Be the cook for my pirate ship!

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
